> (fountains, parking,
> gathering areas, flag poles, etc.) outside the foot

> buildings and structures contemplated by the Master
> Plan and the hardscape

> "Arena."

> physical site characteristics, design objectives and
> environmental

> consisting of continued
> development and expansion of landscape Schematic
> Design Documents and

> scope and preliminary details for landscape work

--- John Amerling jamerling@rrcaribbean.com wrote:

This has been sent to Darren to permit clarification
of the EDSA scope. I
wanted to make sure that you knew that this was in
process.

EDSA SCOPE OF WORK

EDSA is being engaged to perform two basic
engagements:

  1.  Layout a pathway, biking and hiking trail

system outside of the
existing road system and modify the layout of the
existing road system to
accommodate the new uses contemplated by the Master
Plan for the Island
designated as FB-1; and

  1.  provide all landscaping services and

documentation which may be
required to implement fully the Master Plan for the
island designated as
FB-1.

The delivery of the services shall be managed by the
Construction Manager,
provided that all matters of aesthetics shall be
determined by the Owner.
All designs and work product shall be provided in
appropriate form and media
to the FTP web site for the project maintained by
the Maguire Group which
shall coordinate and integrate the designs with the
plans and specifications
for the each project contemplated by the Master
Plan.

Such services shall include, without limitation:

  1.  General layout and location of all minor

structures, roadways,
walkways, landscape walls, and other site amenities
(fountains, parking,
gathering areas, flag poles, etc.) outside the foot
print of the major
buildings and structures contemplated by the Master
Plan and the hardscape
integral to each such building including the
"Arena."

  1.  Site grading. (but not storm water system

design)

  1.   Selection and layout of all plant

materials.

  1.  Irrigation system layout.

  2.  Design and of all exterior hard services

including roadways,
walkways, patios, fountains, landscape walls, and
other special site
amenities outside the footprint of the major
buildings and structures
contemplated by the Master Plan and the hardscape
integral to each such
building including the "Arena."

  1.  Selection and layout of site lighting, but

not the electrical
circuitry.

  1.  During construction, selection of plant

materials from nursery
stock.

The Landscape design services and documentation to
be provided shall consist
of:

  1.  During the Schematic Design Phase

consideration of alternate
materials, systems and equipment and development of
conceptual design
solutions for land forms, lawns and plantings based
on program requirements,
physical site characteristics, design objectives and
environmental
determinants

  1.  During the Design Development Phase

consisting of continued
development and expansion of landscape Schematic
Design Documents and
development of outline Specifications or materials
lists to establish final
scope and preliminary details for landscape work

  1.  During the Contract Documents Phase

consisting of preparation of
Drawings and Specifications based on approved Design
Development Documents,
setting forth in detail the landscape requirements
for the Project.

  1.  During all phases participating by telephone

in design review team
conferences to be held once a month during the
course of such phases.

http://mail.yahoo.com
